name: Collapsible
description: A single collapsible section with a trigger button and an animated content panel. Built on Base UI Collapsible with StyleX styling.

defaultOpen.description: Initial open state for uncontrolled mode.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when the open state changes.

dataAttributes.data-disabled: Present when the collapsible is disabled.

Trigger.description: Button that toggles the panel open and closed. Includes a built-in chevron icon that rotates on open.

dataAttributes.data-panel-open: Present when the panel is expanded.
dataAttributes.data-disabled: Present when the collapsible is disabled.

Panel.description: Collapsible content area with animated height transition. Uses keepMounted internally for smooth close animation.

keepMounted.description: Whether to keep the element in the DOM while closed. Defaults to true for animation support.

hiddenUntilFound.description: Whether the panel can be found by the browser's built-in page search.

dataAttributes.data-open: Present when the panel is expanded.
dataAttributes.data-starting-style: Present when the panel is animating open.
dataAttributes.data-ending-style: Present when the panel is animating closed.

cssVariables.--collapsible-panel-height: The panel's content height, set by Base UI. Used for expand/collapse animation.
cssVariables.--collapsible-panel-width: The panel's content width, set by Base UI.

cssRequirements.description: Panel height animation requires global CSS rules inside @layer priority1. StyleX cannot target data-attribute selectors, so these rules must live in the consumer's global stylesheet.

intents.reasoning: Collapsible is the primary component for a single collapsible section with a trigger and animated panel.
Collapsible provides simple progressive disclosure — content is hidden by default and revealed on demand.

avoidWhen.scenario: Multiple collapsible sections that belong together
avoidWhen.reasoning: Use Accordion instead. Accordion manages a group of collapsible sections with proper keyboard navigation and optional single-open behavior.

avoidWhen.scenario: Switching between views or content panels
avoidWhen.reasoning: Use Tabs instead. Collapsible reveals content in place; Tabs switch between distinct views.

examples.name: disabled
examples.code:
<Collapsible.Root disabled>
  <Collapsible.Trigger>Cannot toggle</Collapsible.Trigger>
  <Collapsible.Panel>This panel cannot be opened</Collapsible.Panel>
</Collapsible.Root>
